feedback.heading: See what others say

items.content: Our subsidiary's mobile site was always hard to use. After redesigning the interface and flow, our user numbers went up a lot — great work!
items.author: Gon Chen

items.content: I worried tech communication would be hard, but they explain things in plain language. The design and site were delivered earlier than expected, and they proactively optimize it regularly!
items.author: Mr. Chou

items.content: I'd just opened my business — running around factories and suppliers while needing a site and marketing was a lot. They handled a simple site and social content, and it's been thoughtful and solid so far.
items.author: Ms. Wang

items.content: I urgently needed an event landing page and a promo short video. Thanks for the professional guidance — the CTA button design doubled our sign-ups. Will work together again.
items.author: Gee Huang

items.content: They built my website. I really didn't know how to set one up, but they patiently walked me through it. After launch people started reaching out — it really feels like I'm getting noticed.
items.author: Photographer Shu

items.content: After working together on my site and marketing, way more people reach out to me now! They even suggested UX details I hadn't noticed.
items.author: Ms. Chang

about.p1: I'm a marketer, a designer, and a front-end developer at the same time. I can juggle all of this not because I have more hours in the day, but because I lean heavily on AI and automation.
about.p2: My ultimate goal is to build an AI system that runs my business on autopilot — letting AI handle my marketing carousels, blog posts and visual design.
about.p3: Along the way, I've gathered the most practical, genuinely money-making templates and tool packs into the Digital Toolbox. The shortcuts I've found, you can copy directly.

cards.label: Plug & play
cards.title: Digital Toolbox
cards.desc: Ready-made prompts, templates and asset packs — pick one and go, so you never get stuck at 'where do I start?'

cards.label: Let AI handle the repetition
cards.title: Automation templates
cards.desc: Turn repetitive marketing, copy and design work into automation templates and AI workflows.

cards.label: One person can do it

info.heading: How can I help you?

info.sub2: From solo creators to early-stage brands and small businesses.
info.whyHeading: A brand front-door, tailored to you

why.title: All-in-one｜design × tech × marketing
why.desc: I don't just design and build front-ends — I understand marketing, helping your brand create real value and conversion.

why.title: Flexible & custom｜one-on-one, adaptable
why.desc: Whether you're just starting out or already established, I tailor advice and content plans to your goals and budget.

why.title: Flexible engagement｜clear process, transparent pricing
why.desc: You'll always know what's delivered at each stage and when — all content and costs are clear, so working together is stress-free.

svc.title: Software Development Services
svc.intro1: Custom software development: websites, AI tools, LINE bots, automation and more
svc.intro2: All custom projects are quoted based on actual needs and effort — feel free to message me
svc.lineCta: Ask for a quote on LINE
svc.customDesc: These are all custom projects — no fixed packages. I'll assess your specs, complexity and effort, then quote accordingly.

customServices.title: Website & system development
customServices.highlight: Front-end & back-end, database design, API integration, cloud deployment
customServices.description: Build a bespoke website and admin system from scratch — members, payments, data management and other complex logic — with deployment and ongoing maintenance.
customServices.ta: ✅ For brands & businesses with unique needs that templates can't meet

customServices.title: AI tool development
customServices.highlight: ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini API integration, RAG knowledge base, custom AI assistants
customServices.description: Build bespoke AI applications: knowledge-base Q&A, auto-reply bots, AI document and content workflows.
customServices.ta: ✅ For businesses or solo founders looking to boost efficiency with AI

customServices.title: LINE bot development
customServices.highlight: LINE Messaging API, auto-reply, rich menus, CRM integration
customServices.description: Build LINE official-account bots with smart conversation, auto-push and form collection, connected to your backend or spreadsheets for automated customer management.
customServices.ta: ✅ For shops & brands managing customers through LINE

customServices.title: Automation workflows
customServices.highlight: Make / n8n / Zapier / Google Apps Script automation
customServices.description: Connect SaaS tools and APIs into hands-off workflows that cut repetitive manual work and let the system work for you.
customServices.ta: ✅ For teams with lots of repetitive tasks wanting to cut costs

svc.webSub: What I can do for you
svc.webDesc: From design and development to launch — pick what you need. Common website packages and starting prices are shown below.

svc.basicNote: Optional services you can add; cost is quoted together after assessment.
svc.advNote: Extendable advanced features, quoted per project needs.

basicAddons.name: Domain & hosting
basicAddons.description: Domain registration, basic hosting, HTTPS SSL certificate

basicAddons.name: Advanced commercial SSL
basicAddons.description: Only needed for special business requirements

basicAddons.name: Multi-language switch
basicAddons.description: Add English / Japanese versions (translation copy not included)

advancedAddons.name: Animations
advancedAddons.description: Basic Lottie animation; WebGL interactions quoted separately

advancedAddons.name: LINE integration
advancedAddons.description: Official account binding, LINE Login or Messaging API

advancedAddons.name: Payment integration
advancedAddons.description: ECPay / Line Pay etc. (contract fees excluded)

advancedAddons.name: GTM conversion tracking
advancedAddons.description: Conversion goals & event tracking (incl. basic report reading)

advancedAddons.name: Third-party data integration
advancedAddons.description: Integrate external data (e.g. Google Calendar, live exchange rates, maps)

advancedAddons.name: Automation integration
advancedAddons.description: Automated notifications & cross-platform (e.g. LINE Notify, SMS, Slack)

advancedAddons.name: Advanced forms
advancedAddons.description: Multi-step forms, file upload, conditional logic

advancedAddons.name: Booking system
advancedAddons.description: Online time-slot booking (incl. Google Calendar sync)

advancedAddons.name: Wix extensions
advancedAddons.description: Custom code embedding, database integration, etc.
